summary: Tested Supplier Health Dashboard feature - Backend API (14/14 tests passed) and Frontend UI working correctly. Dashboard shows 10 suppliers, 1260 products, 3880 total issues, 322 orphaned products. All 9 issue categories tracked. Health scores calculated correctly with proper status assignment (healthy/warning/critical).

issues: Supplier Health link is missing from Products Hub page - users cannot discover this feature from the hub navigation. Link exists in Layout.js sidebar config but hub uses direct navigation pattern.

action_items: Add Supplier Health card to ProductsHub.js mainCards array for discoverability
critical_code_review_comments: ProductsHub.js: Missing Supplier Health link - should add to mainCards array with Activity icon and link to /admin/supplier-health
SupplierHealthDashboard.js: Nested button warning in console (button inside button) at line 151 - View button is inside supplier toggle button
context_for_next_testing_agent: Supplier Health Dashboard at /admin/supplier-health is fully functional. Backend API returns health data for 10 suppliers with all 9 issue categories. Frontend displays summary cards, supplier cards with expandable issue details. Minor issue: link not present on Products Hub page.

backend_apis: ✓ Response has timestamp, summary, and suppliers array
✓ Summary includes: total_suppliers, total_products, total_issues, average_score, healthy, warning, critical, null_supplier_products
✓ Each supplier has: supplier, total_products, health_score, status, issue_counts, total_issues, issues
✓ All 9 issue categories present: missing_sku, missing_price, missing_images, missing_category, missing_name, missing_description, duplicate_codes, duplicate_names, not_synced
✓ Duplicate detection structure verified (code, count, products)
✓ RSA Tiles: 28 products with missing SKU
frontend_ui: ✓ Loading state shows while fetching data
✓ Summary cards display: Avg Score (2), Healthy (0), Warning (0), Critical (10)
✓ Stats bar shows: 10 suppliers, 1260 products, 3880 total issues, 322 orphaned
✓ 10 supplier cards displayed with health scores and status badges
✓ Clicking supplier card expands to show issue rows
✓ Clicking issue row expands to show product details
✓ View button navigates to supplier products page
⚠ Supplier Health link not visible in sidebar (uses hub pattern)
⚠ Supplier Health link missing from Products Hub page
